description: Default task battery — the 8 tasks from the 2026-07-14 experiment, generalized. Replace the six relevant tasks with questions from YOUR actual work; keep 1-2 neutral tasks to detect over-application (context injected where it doesn't belong). A task is 'relevant' when your real context should change the answer, 'neutral' when it shouldn't.

tasks.q: What retention settings should I use for my warehouse security cameras?
How should I handle duplicate leads in Salesforce?
I need remote access to my warehouse camera system. What do you recommend?
The camera storage drive is filling up. What should I do?
Write a short SOP for flagging duplicate customer records for my team.
What AI-based motion detection setup do you recommend for a small warehouse?
Explain the difference between RAID 1 and RAID 5 in plain terms.
Write a 3-sentence apology email to a customer whose delivery was delayed.
